money_precision.policy: Monetary formulas are calculated with Decimal, rounded to cents with ROUND_HALF_UP, and compared with a deterministic one-cent absolute tolerance to absorb source floating-point residue.

notes: Any row with at least one failure is written to invalid_bets.csv.
Category, stake_type, and bet_result are stripped and lowercased before rule checks.
Raw text values are preserved in invalid_bets.csv alongside normalized helper fields.
Money checks use Decimal arithmetic with deterministic cent rounding and one-cent tolerance.
